meta.title: Amazon FBA 2026 US Logistics Fee Schedule (Including High Return Rate Fees)

fuel_surcharge.note: 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge applied to all FBA fulfillment fees starting 2026-04-17. Fees in this file exclude the surcharge.

notes: fee_usd is the 2026 non-peak fee for items priced $10–$50 (most common range). Use price_brackets for full precision.
Shipping weight for Small Standard and Extra-Large 150+ lb uses unit weight. All other tiers use the greater of unit or dimensional weight.
Extra-Large (up to 150 lb) exceeding 96 inches on longest side or 130 inches for length plus girth incurs an additional Overmax handling fee.

standard_non_apparel.description: FBA Fulfillment Fees for Standard Products (Excluding Apparel and Dangerous Goods)

dangerous_goods.description: FBA Fulfillment Fees for Dangerous Goods (Hazmat) requiring special handling

high_return_rate_fees.policy_notes: Charged to units above category threshold (except Apparel/Shoes which are charged for each returned unit). Thresholds audited quarterly.

tiers.fee_formula: $6.74 + $0.32 per 1 lb interval above first lb
$26.33 + $0.38 per lb interval above first lb

other_products.description: Charged to returned units above threshold

tiers.fee_formula: $5.00 + $0.05 per 4 oz interval above first 3 lb
$6.74 + $0.32 per 1 lb interval above first lb
$26.33 + $0.38 per lb interval above first lb
